overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a white cloak journeying through the Limgrave region. The clip transitions from a dark, narrow canyon with floating red particles and light rain to an open landscape under a dramatic crimson sky with distant castle ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark narrow canyon with floating red embers and light rain

events.description: location name 'Limgrave' appears on screen identifying the region
rain begins falling as white streaks visible against the dark canyon walls

agents.ego_description: character in white cloak walking steadily through the dark stone canyon

entered.detail: tall dark rock cliff face forming the canyon boundary
tall dark rock cliff face forming the canyon boundary
wooden stakes lining the left edge of the path
glowing red embers floating throughout the air
cobblestone pathway winding through the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. Red particles float in the air and rain begins to fall, creating a moody blue atmosphere. The location name 'Limgrave' appears briefly as the character progresses along the stone path.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon exit with dramatic crimson sky visible ahead

events.description: sky transitions from dark blue to vivid crimson red as the canyon opens up
rain ceases as the character approaches the brightly lit canyon exit

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bright red sky opening at the canyon's end

entered.detail: bright red and orange sky visible through the canyon exit
large floating stone platforms suspended in the sky
ancient stone structure ruins on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the canyon exit where the environment transforms dramatically. The sky shifts to a vivid crimson red, illuminating the scene with warm golden light. The canyon walls recede into the distance as floating rock platforms become visible against the colorful sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant castle ruins under crimson sky

events.description: exits the canyon completely into the open landscape
large castle ruins become visible in the distant mist ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through open grassland toward distant castle structures

entered.detail: large ancient castle with multiple towers visible in the distance
trees with orange and yellow autumn foliage lining the path
tall grass covering the ground on either side of the stone path

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open landscape with autumn-colored trees and tall grass lining the path. The sky is entirely filled with dramatic crimson and gold clouds. Large castle ruins become visible in the distant mist as the character continues walking along the stone pathway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gloomy, narrow canyon that gradually opens into a vast, crimson-hued landscape. It begins with a character walking along a stone path between steep rock walls under a moody blue atmosphere, where light rain falls and red particles float in the air. As the character approaches the canyon exit, the environment transforms dramatically, with the sky shifting to a vivid crimson red that bathes the receding walls in warm golden light. The scene then expands into a wide open vista of autumn-colored trees and tall grass, revealing floating rock platforms against the colorful horizon. Finally, the camera follows the path forward as large castle ruins emerge from the distant mist under a sky filled with dramatic crimson and gold clouds.
